title: One last kiss
wikitext:
[]: One last kiss             Quote Post by UltraB116 » Sat Feb 13, 2021 10:23 am What do you guys think about the song and its lyrics? I really like the song and definitely want to hear the full song soon. The lyrics is meaningful too, which makes me wonder what message behind it?

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Feb 13, 2021 10:37 am I think the song is alright. Not bad by any stretch, but nothing to write home about; certainly doesn't hit the same magnitude and momentum as Sakura Nagashi or Tamashii no Refrain. As title song for the big finale I find it almost disappointing to be perfectly honest

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sat Feb 13, 2021 11:11 am I think the lyrics of this song confusing: the first verses I imagined some relationship between Rei and Shinji (the covers of the CD and vinyl editions induced me even more so), or even in relation to Yui. However, the other verses revealed on TV spot, do not seem to match what I thought before, especially the part "Let's make it a fiery kiss". I can't imagine what the context of this song is in the film. Regarding the song itself, I still prefer "Beautiful World" and "Sakura Nagashi" instead. For me "One Last Kiss" doesn't fit my musical taste - in fact neither "Beautiful World" does, "Sakura Nagashi" is the closest one to my preferences.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Feb 13, 2021 11:31 am I wish I could listen to the full song

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by The_Max » Sat Feb 13, 2021 11:54 am https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HiYZv2F39lk

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by ArtyumR » Sat Feb 13, 2021 12:49 pm JoelcrNeto wrote: I think the lyrics of this song confusing: the first verses I imagined some relationship between Rei and Shinji (the covers of the CD and vinyl editions induced me even more so), or even in relation to Yui. However, the other verses revealed on TV spot, do not seem to match what I thought before, especially the part "Let's make it a fiery kiss". I can't imagine what the context of this song is in the film. Regarding the song itself, I still prefer "Beautiful World" and "Sakura Nagashi" instead. For me "One Last Kiss" doesn't fit my musical taste - in fact neither "Beautiful World" does, "Sakura Nagashi" is the closest one to my preferences.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat Feb 13, 2021 1:02 pm I think it sounds good and it definitely worked well with the latest 3.0 + 1.0 trailer. I personally love how the climax of this song is gradually built up and how this characteristic is translated into the images that we see on the screen. But of course, in my opinion, this piece is nowhere near the quality of others such as "Escape to the Beginning", "Expansion of Blockade", "Everything You've Ever Dreamed For", "Koom, Süsser Tod", "Thanatos - If I Can't Be Yours", "The Passage of Emptiness", "Hedgehog's Dilemma", "Separation Anxiety" and many more.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sat Feb 13, 2021 1:46 pm IMHO, all the songs performed by Yoko Takahashi is much better: "Soul's Refrain", "Premonition", "Eternal Embrace" and "Happiness Smells of Sin". Well, I don't need to mention the NGE opening theme, hehe. Of course all the songs performed by LOREN & MASH and Arianne they're excellent too, specially "Komm, süßer Tod"! ArtyumR wrote: [...] and that "sakura nagashi" and "Beautiful World" are the same case.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Feb 13, 2021 1:58 pm JoelcrNeto wrote: I understand your PoV, perhaps you're right, but I think the both song has indeed meaning. I can see in "Beautiful World" either Rei, Misato or both talking about Shinji, and "Sakura Nagashi" could be about Kaworu and Shinji relationship. I think "One Last Kiss" has a meaning too, but it's pretty hard to know for now.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Feb 13, 2021 2:49 pm The lyrics are written by Utada, not by Anno or Sagisu like "Komm, Suber tod" or "THANATOS". I wouldn't read too much in the lyrics either way, they are "fitting" because Utada is a great singer and lyricist.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Feb 13, 2021 2:58 pm In addition to that, exactly. Presumably Anno still has some degree of control over them, so dismissing them entirely is usually not the way either, but trying to infer some sort of definitive evidence from them is tacky

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sat Feb 13, 2021 3:09 pm What I wanted to say is that I can see that these songs are related to some character, that's all. It's just my perspective.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by UltraB116 » Sat Feb 13, 2021 8:59 pm I thought the song was about Shinji and Rei at first, but the lyrics is not that related to them later on, I’m confused. However the covers of the CD and LP kind of suggest the importance of Rei and Shinji in the last movie? I really like the colour design of the covers tho.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by UltraB116 » Sat Feb 13, 2021 9:00 pm The_Max wrote: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HiYZv2F39lk

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Sat Feb 13, 2021 10:31 pm JoelcrNeto wrote: Regarding the song itself, I still prefer "Beautiful World" and "Sakura Nagashi" instead. For me "One Last Kiss" doesn't fit my musical taste - in fact neither "Beautiful World" does, "Sakura Nagashi" is the closest one to my preferences.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sun Feb 14, 2021 2:12 am UltraB116 wrote: What do you guys think about the song and its lyrics? I really like the song and definitely want to hear the full song soon. The lyrics is meaningful too, which makes me wonder what message behind it?

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Sun Feb 14, 2021 2:56 am Jäeger wrote: Adn not even close to "Everything You've Ever Dreamed For", "Koom, Süsser Tod", "Tamashii no Refrain" and we better don't talk about "Cruel Angel Thesis". Songs that are poppy/commercial but NEVER generic.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Feb 14, 2021 3:02 am Nostalgia goggles over 9000 I think. "Komm, Susser Tod" is the nth retake on Hey Jude with cheesy lyrics, the only reason why it got popular is because of the Instrumentality scene being an anime classic. "A Cruel's Angel Thesis" has literally nothing to do with the show (and infact the lyricist of the song didn't have a clue on what NGE was about), the best thing about it is "Good, or Don't be". The really good and fitting in NGE is "Tamashii no Refrain", but that is basically a lost song in the various Death recuts (and imo by removing that scene they removed all the reasons for Death to exists). Thanatos is pretty okay too.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Sun Feb 14, 2021 3:18 am Joseki wrote: Nostalgia goggles over 9000 I think.

[]: Re: One last kiss             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Feb 14, 2021 3:29 am I don't need to act like anything, I had already expressed my opinion on ACAT and especially KSM on this forum years in the past. The "there is a reason why it's popular" argument works both way too when you consider Utada is Japan's most popular singer and Beautiful World / Sakura Nagashi are some big critical and commercial hits.
